all_violations.description: Dynamic provider event IDs are generated with Date.now(), which can make failures harder to replay exactly.
all_violations.suggestion: Route event-id generation through a deterministic test helper with seeded or injected clock values.

all_violations.description: UI automation path also uses Date.now() derived IDs, introducing non-repeatable payload values.
all_violations.suggestion: Use shared deterministic ID factory for webhook payloads in both API and E2E specs.

all_violations.description: Suite is forced to serial execution, indicating inter-test dependency and reduced isolation.
all_violations.suggestion: Split stateful scenarios into isolated setup/teardown blocks so tests can run in parallel.

all_violations.description: E2E automate suite is also pinned to serial mode, increasing coupling between test cases.
all_violations.suggestion: Use per-test context factories and cleanup hooks to remove ordering constraints.

all_violations.description: Context factories produce reusable IDs and domain entities that may overlap across concurrent workers.
all_violations.suggestion: Generate unique per-test entity keys or enforce cleanup contracts in fixtures.

all_violations.description: Spec file exceeds 300 lines, increasing cognitive load and debugging complexity.
all_violations.suggestion: Split by behavior slices (dispatch, webhook translation, event query determinism).
all_violations.code_snippet: 379-line file with mixed scenarios and helper logic

all_violations.description: Large multi-scenario suite combines policy-gate, rollout, webhook, and dispatch checks in one file.
all_violations.suggestion: Decompose into focused specs per capability and share fixtures/helpers.

all_violations.description: E2E automate spec exceeds 300 lines and duplicates helper patterns from API coverage.
all_violations.suggestion: Extract shared assertion helpers and keep each scenario under ~120 lines.

all_violations.description: Repeated envelope and payload assertion structures appear across files with minor variations.
all_violations.suggestion: Introduce reusable assertion helpers for envelope and provider-neutral checks.

all_violations.description: E2E suite primarily exercises API request flows, duplicating backend assertions from API specs.
all_violations.suggestion: Keep API contract assertions in API tests and reserve E2E for UI behavior validation.

all_violations.description: Epic F story f-3 has no matching test specs in API or E2E suites.
all_violations.suggestion: Add ATDD + automate coverage for f-3 fallback correlation mapping and replay-safe constraints.

all_violations.description: All ATDD scenarios in this file are skipped, removing acceptance-level guardrails for f-2.
all_violations.suggestion: Unskip and stabilize core ATDD scenarios for canonical event persistence and filtering.

all_violations.description: All E2E ATDD scenarios for f-1 are skipped, leaving UI-level acceptance criteria unverified.
all_violations.suggestion: Re-enable core thread-detail and refusal UX acceptance scenarios.

all_violations.description: E2E ATDD coverage for canonical timeline filtering is fully skipped.
all_violations.suggestion: Recover at least one deterministic happy-path UI ATDD case per acceptance criterion.

all_violations.description: Active f-4 E2E automation is API-request driven and does not validate browser UI behavior for cutover guardrails.
all_violations.suggestion: Add UI-level assertions for operator-visible cutover and refusal signals.

all_violations.description: Serial suite execution reduces throughput for CI shards and increases wall-clock runtime.
all_violations.suggestion: Refactor to parallel-safe test cases and remove serial mode where isolation is restored.

all_violations.description: E2E automation is constrained to serial mode, limiting concurrency gains.
all_violations.suggestion: Partition deterministic setup and run scenarios in parallel groups.

all_violations.description: Large multipurpose spec likely increases retry cost and diagnosis time when a single scenario fails.
all_violations.suggestion: Split heavy specs to improve execution granularity and rerun speed.

top_10_recommendations.recommendation: Refactor Epic F specs into smaller concern-based files.
Create shared assertion utilities for envelopes and provider-neutral payload checks.
Reduce API assertion duplication inside E2E suites.
Create dedicated f-3 API and E2E specs covering fallback correlation mapping.
Remove skip markers from Epic F ATDD suites and stabilize fixtures.
Ensure each Epic F story has at least one active UI-level acceptance scenario.
Centralize deterministic provider-event ID generation in test factories.
Inject a test clock or deterministic suffix generator where event IDs are required.
Keep sort logic deterministic by asserting canonical order against stable fixtures.
Remove serial mode from suites where state can be made independent.
